# Saint Cleophas Outreach Ministry

> A parish of the Reformed Catholic Church, within the Diocese of Our Lady, Queen of Martyrs, serving Martinsville and Collinsville, Virginia. The parish worships in the Anglican liturgical tradition — the 1979 Book of Common Prayer, the Revised Common Lectionary, and the Hymnal 1982. The Reformed Catholic Church is an independent Catholic jurisdiction (not Anglican); the Anglican liturgy is the parish's own practice. Dedicated to recognizing the face of Christ in marginalized people. Tagline: "Recognizing Christ in the Stranger." Pastor: Rev. Fr. Mychal Gallop.

## Worship

- [Mass Times & Schedule](mass-times.html): Full liturgical schedule. Sunday Mass 3:00 PM at Smith Memorial United Methodist Church Chapel, 2703 Daniels Creek Rd, Collinsville VA 24078 (in person and live-streamed on Facebook). Wednesday Mass 12:00 PM at First Baptist Church Chapel, 23 Starling Ave, Martinsville VA 24112. Wednesday Morning Prayer 9:30 AM and Evening Prayer 4:30 PM (both live-streamed). Bible Study Wednesdays 1:00 PM. Confession 2:30 PM before Sunday Mass; also available during office hours. Anointing of the Sick available during office hours and by appointment for the homebound or hospitalized.
- [News & Bulletin](news.html): Current weekly bulletin and parish announcements.

## About

- [Home](index.html): Welcome, mission overview, and the story of Saint Cleophas and the Road to Emmaus (Luke 24:13–35).
- [Our Church](church.html): Denominational identity. Saint Cleophas is a parish of the Reformed Catholic Church (reformedcatholic.org), within the Diocese of Our Lady, Queen of Martyrs (queen-of-martyrs.com). Explains the three-tier structure (parish → diocese → denomination), the RCC's Catholic heritage and inclusive theology, and the parish's Anglican liturgical tradition.
- [Ministries & Outreach](ministries.html): Worship, pastoral care, Bible study, and community-based outreach, with particular attention to people experiencing housing insecurity, poverty, or social isolation.
- [Partners & Collaborators](partners.html): Ecumenical partners including Smith Memorial United Methodist Church (Collinsville) and First Baptist Church (Martinsville).

## Contact

- [Contact & Visit](contact.html): Two worship locations, office hours (Mon 9–5, Tue 12–5, Wed–Thu 9–5), phone (276) 388-9004, email st.cleophasoutreach@gmail.com, and Facebook live stream link.

## Optional

- [Facebook](https://www.facebook.com/profile.php?id=61555982034414): Live-streamed Sunday Mass, Morning Prayer, and Evening Prayer.
- [Reformed Catholic Church](https://www.reformedcatholic.org/): The denomination Saint Cleophas belongs to.
- [Diocese of Our Lady, Queen of Martyrs](https://www.queen-of-martyrs.com/): The regional diocese within the RCC.
